title: Power Integrations Full Year 2024 Earnings: EPS Beats Expectations
text: Power Integrations reported mixed results for full year 2024. The semiconductor company generated revenue of $419.0 million, representing a 5.8% decline from the previous year. The company's profitability contracted significantly, with net income falling 42% to $32.2 million and profit margins compressing from 13% to 7.7%. Despite the top-line weakness, the company exceeded earnings expectations. Its EPS of $0.57 surpassed analyst estimates by 5.7%, despite declining from $0.97 in 2023. Research and development represented the largest operating expense at $100.8 million. Non-operating gains of $14.3 million helped offset operational challenges. Analysts project revenue growth averaging 15% annually over the next two years, below the semiconductor industry's anticipated 17% growth rate. The stock experienced a modest 4.2% decline over the previous week, and the analysis notes warning signs warranting investor consideration.
